prompt: Design and build a cybersecurity product page for ShieldNet, an enterprise threat detection platform. Use Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Include a 3D interactive globe built with React Three Fiber showing real-time threat connection arcs between points. Add animated stat counters, a dark enterprise-grade theme with green accent colors, trust-building sections with compliance badges, an integration partners logo grid, and a demo request CTA. Performance must be excellent — FCP under 1.5s.
expected_3d_features: Green emissive materials for threat indicators
design_notes: Deep dark theme (#0D1117 base), matrix-green accents (#00FF41 / #10B981), monospace fonts for data elements, enterprise-grade trust layout
